name: GuL_Plantower
description: A library for interfacing with Plantower particulate matter sensors. PMS1003, PMS3003, PM5003, PM5003ST, PM6003, PM7003, PM9003M and PMA003 are supported at the moment.
keywords: Plantower, PM2.5, sensor, air quality, PMS1003, PMS3003, PM5003, PM5003ST, PM6003, PM7003, PM9003M, PMA003
